title: An Act authorizing the town of Palmer to grant additional licenses for the sale of all alcoholic beverages

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Smola of Warren and Senator Oliveira, a joint petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 466) of Todd M. Smola and Jacob R. Oliveira (by vote of the town) that the town of Palmer be authorized to issue five additional licenses for the sale of all alcoholic beverages to be drunk on the premises and one additional license for the sale of all alcoholic beverages not to be drunk on the premise in said town.  Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure

related_entities.name: committee on Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 05/12/2025 from 10:00 AM-01:00 PM in A-2
Accompanied a new draft, see H4282
